overview: I built 9 eval modules, a 4-section Responsible AI dashboard, and a reusable governance template for my SAFe Feature Spec System.

keyPoints.title: Started at 48%: 12 of 25 responsibility checks passed
Reviewer agent consumes 80% of total pipeline input tokens
Boosted inputs returned 0 inventions; bare cases had at least one
Claude Code proactively improved my two-cap cost guardrail design
Responsible AI is a quality layer embedded in production, not a category
